reviews.reviewTitle: Best place to stay for family
reviews.reviewComments: The Pade Hotel in Banda Aceh is an excellent choice, especially for family travelers. The rooms are incredibly comfortable, the service is exceptional, and the staff is consistently friendly and attentive. Highly recommended for a relaxing stay!

Likes:
Large room; big, comfortable bed; strong WiFi; TV with Netflix, Apple, YouTube, etc; decent shower; excellent breakfast; good service.

Dislikes:
Reality somewhat different to the publicity photos; has definitely seen better days with obvious signs of wear and tear and a lack of attention to detail - stained sheets, broken seal on refrigerator led to water leaking all over the floor, toilet had apparently not been cleaned with a brush in ages, wonky pictures on the wall, bathroom extractor fan not working, cigarette burns on sofa, etc; large balcony but with nothing whatsoever on it; poor sound-proofing due to inter-connecting door with next room (could even hear bags rustling); no ramp for luggage upon arrival, just a dozen or so steep steps from the driveway.

Stayed here 1 night before Eid to see how the celebrations go in Aceh. I have to say the staff went out of their way to help me as I had forgotten to bring my contact lense solution. As this was the eve of a big celebration/public holiday, I was not expecting for much to happen, but reception managed to get it for me for which I am extremely grateful for. Waking up to the view of the paddy fields and mountains was perfect, and the beds and pillows were super comfortable. Would stay again!
Kamar hotel yang luas dengan balkon, serta suasana yang tenang ketika memasuki hotel, memberi kenyamanan untuk tinggal dengan tenang.

(+) Kamar luas dan bersih, ada balkonnya. Desain bangunan sangat bagus.
(-) lokasi agak jauh ke tengah kota. Restoran kapasitasnya kecil jadi harus nunggu utk dapat tempat duduk utk sarapan.

Overall a good place to stay if you prefer away from city. A nice coffee place across the hotel for some good coffee and meals. Room could be better with better lighting. Take the 2nd or 3rd floor as 1st floor at ground level is more open to public and you don't have much privacy. 

Breakfast is just average as compared to some other hotels in Banda Aceh - could have been better. 

Staff were friendly and helpful.

The hotel has very distinctive theme. Its main strong point is the beautiful architecture and the majestic mountain view through the main hotel hall. For time spending, it offers a pool, gym centre, and cozy lobby. That being said, pool and gym are okay though a bit small. In front of the hotel, a food court is available till 11 p.m. All in all, this is a good resort hotel for short vacation which is close to the bus terminal but quite far from most of the city attractions

The Pade Hotel recommended

reviews.originalComment:
価格と設備、サービスは見合っている。ホテル内に売店はないので、必要な物は買っておく必要がある。
マッサージは、かなり安い。しかし、質は期待してはいけない。値段相応。
朝食はアチェ、インドネシア料理がメインで、種類豊富。洋食は少ない。
どうしてもハエが居るのが気になった。
部屋はダウンライトしかないので暗い。
雨や曇りが多かったので、お化粧するのに暗くて困った。仕事にも適さない。
1日だけ、夜中にうるさい家族が隣に入り、迷惑だった。夜中にチェックインするなら、隣に人が居ない離れた部屋に入って欲しい。
シャワーの水圧もよい。
アメニティも毎日補充があり、水のボトルも2本無料で置いてくれる。歯ブラシあり。アイロンと台は借用可能。
セーフティボックスもある。
お土産を買える店があると嬉しい。軽食、飲み物、ホテルグッズなど売られていたら買うのになと思った。
総じて価格に対しリーズナブルといえる。
reviews.reviewComments: The price, facilities, and services are balanced. There is no convenience store within the hotel, so you need to buy the necessary items in advance. The massages are quite cheap, but you shouldn't expect much quality; they are average for the price. The breakfast mainly features Acehnese and Indonesian dishes with a wide variety, while Western options are limited. I was particularly annoyed by the presence of flies. The room is dark since it only has downlights. It was difficult to put on makeup due to the rain and cloudy weather, making it unsuitable for work. One night, a noisy family checked in next door, which was bothersome. If someone checks in at night, I would prefer to be placed in a distant room where there are no neighbors. The shower has good water pressure. Amenities are replenished daily, and two bottles of water are provided for free. There is a toothbrush available, and there are irons and boards available for borrowing. A safe is also provided. It would be nice to have a store to buy souvenirs. I would have bought snacks, drinks, and hotel goods if they were for sale. Overall, it can be said to be reasonable for the price.

We booked through Agoda for 2 rooms but then got an email from the hotel saying that only one room was available at that price. Very unprofessional.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good enough for the region, but poor services.
reviews.reviewComments: Restaurant totally overpriced for the food offered. Bathroom shover has not always warm water. Room was okay and clean. Room key card wasn't working properly. During the  night the police knocked at our door and said it is because of an investigation. After few minutes said we should goto bed again. No further explanation. No single word of regret came from hotel staff. Pool was occupied by kids all day long.
Very friendly

Left something during check out, tried calling them the same day after few hours. Was only given answer will check, till next day same answer. In the end after more than 24hrs only say can't be found.
Good...

Stayed at the mountain view suite for 3 nights. Spacious suite with a lovely view of the paddy fields and mountain. Could see the women planting paddy - it was planting season.  Guests can walk on the path behind the hotel, right onto the fields. Lovely.

Very clean rooms; no problems at all with insects; A/C and water/shower/toilet all work well.  Breakfast buffet is good and staff is friendly and helpful.  Be sure to ask for a quiet room, towards the back of the hotel, facing the rice-paddy fields and away from the street noise: this is important, since the hotel is located on a busy road.  But you won't hear the noise at all if your room is at the back.  Overall, a very satisfying stay.

reviews.reviewTitle: Fine hotel, a bit out of town
reviews.reviewComments: Very nice modern hotels with very good modern facilities and a great view down the central area. Stylish. The one issue that it is a bit out of town, on the way from the airport. Not many facilities nearby. If you want to see a lot of the town, go further in and put up with poorer facilities..but at least it is a quick ride to the airport on leaving town. A good choice if the location is OK for you.

reviews.reviewTitle: 5th + visit here as have family in Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments:
I have been coming to this hotel for a few year's now and can give a end of year 2016 update.  The staff are, without doubt superb - very friendly and helpful and speak not bad English.

The Room: This room I was in was 3404, and I liked the view to the mountains, the a/c worked well also.  The room overall was very clean indeed, and the shower was so HOT and nice + good TV international channels.. on the downside, starting to look dated, but not as bad as the Hermes Hotel down the road (OMG) - maybe a lick of paint and a bigger TV, the DVD device did not work - even after replacement - Internet was poor, required me to go to reception area.

The Pool:  Last time I was here the pool was pea green, this time I could see my toes :) - the food menu is a good price - thumbs up.

Breakfast: Plenty of egg combo's before entering breakfast / restaurant area, good selection of local and international - being English missed a bit more of a Halal breakfast effort, staff again great.

Restaurant: Did not visit this time, but from previous visits, no issues just a little costly.

Bar: Considering the location, expect a high cost - in fact this was the most expensive can of beer per 100 ml I have experienced on planet Earth, it even beats Singapore! very pricey indeed - plus make sure you spray the mosquito stuff as they eat you alive here.

Parking: Limited, but I have a bike there so no problems.

Vehicle Services: Not used on this visit, but reasonable price for airport transfers and the like.

Internet: This was an annoying experience for me being an IT guy, with constant sign ins required to differing access points, but I think this will improve over time - hey it is Aceh after all.

Room / Restaurant Menu:  Comprehensive but double if not triple that of the restaurants outside the hotel who can match like for like the quality - that is if you know where to look :)

Conclusion - I hope the Pade can update the rooms a bit, the bed was very comfortable for me, reduce some of
Overall Ok
The room is great but the water pressure in the shower was a bit slow.

The Pade Hotel is one of most favorite hotel in Banda Aceh.
room, facilities & outdoor very clean, friendly nice staff's. thx The Pade

There are definitely better hotels in Banda Ache.....disappointed.

reviews.reviewTitle: Nice "airport transit" hotel with good food
reviews.reviewComments:
We chose the Pade as a airport transit hotel in Banda Aceh. No real airport hotel yet in Banda Aceh. The Pade certainly is not the nearest one to the airport. It takes around 30 minutes by becak/car to reach the airport provided no traffic jam.

We didn't ask/arrange for airport transfer from the hotel. So, can't say whether or not the hotel arrange such thing.

The hotel basically provides a spacious room, good aircon, acceptable TV cable channels, free wifi, and nice view to the surrounding paddy field and hilly landscape at the far rear of the hotel. The TV will help you pass the time in the hotel. No swimming pool.

Hot water for shower is rather problematic. It's on and off during your shower from cold to terrible hot :(.

Food is really its good element. We had our dinner, breakfast, and snack there. And they were tasty.
The hotel is far from main city.. but it is very comfortable and spacious ..with a nice paddy field view.. dinner at the restaurant was good..and so was breakfast
It was my 3rd time in Banda Aceh but my 4th different hotel stay. I recommend Pade Hotel for its cleanliness and surrounding.

I loved it but as a five star resort, I suggest all staff including restaurant staff be able to speak better English. 

And, Aceh is full of great fruits. Why does the breakfast only come with unripe watermelon and pineapple?
The only problem is mosquitos in the room & bathroom. Hotel must work on this.

From breakfast, brunch, lunch and diner even supper (coz we still order in the late nite) is delicious. All corners of the hotel is really beautiful in morrocan design and instagrammable. We surely will come back again to Pade Hotel

Either you have breakfasts, brunch dinner even supper (coz we keep ordering food until late nite) the food is really consistent in taste and well serve. The ambience of the hotel is really nice and beautiful day or nite with the marocco design architecture its really suit with our Eid Fitr Celebration staycation and for your instagram story or profile. We definitely back again!!

Barely, a *** accommodation.  I am not necessarily impressed by the service (=reasonable), nor by the facilities offered (=average).  I consider it overpriced (even considering my reduction).  The room is reasonably spacious with simple furnishings.  The bathroom is sufficient, a shower curtain can no longer / outdated.  Housekeeping management needs improvement: Twice, only after my reclamation, the room was cleaned.  In addition, it is particularly noisy, both "from the neighbors" the corridors and also "entering and leaving public" [I assume] going to the indoor pool across the courtyard.  The breakfast served (buffet) is mediocre and certainly not continental, as advertised.  I do not consider the (reception) staff very helpful or friendly.  Housekeeping, on the other hand, is very helpful and friendly.  Overall balance still moderately positive.

reviews.originalComment: Pertama kali menginap di hotel ini kesannya, hotelnya memiliki arsitektur unik seperti di Timur Tengah, sangat nyaman buat menginap dengan pasangan/keluarga, pemandangan dari balkon hotel sangat bagus yaitu berupa bukit dan sawah, pelayanan staffnya ramah, ac nya dingin, wifinya kencang, toiletnya bersih, pilihan sarapan nya juga banyak dan enak.

Cuma AC dan kulkas di kamar nggak terlalu bekerja maksimal. AC kurang dingin , sedangkan kulkas udah dicoba nyalain tapi tetap nggak dingin. 

Overall, kece sih hotelnya.

Fasilitas hotel dgn harga 553k waktu itu: king size bed, balkon private, air panas berfungsi baik, ada lift, mknn variatif, necessities kamar lengkap kap kap. minusnya cuma: kolam renangnya ga ada area untuk anak kecil.
Pade hotelnya bersih, layanan dan breakfastnya memuaskan, sayang kolam renangnya agak keluar hotel sedikit ... mau berenang pagi hari tapi cukup rame jadi batal

Sudah 2 kali menginap di the pade hotel banda aceh, yang pertama luar biasa mantap dalam segala hal, yang kedua masih mantap juga.. kamar bersih, ac dingin, ada kolam denang, petugas sangat ramah, sarapan enak..
Hotelnya keren, dan lokasinya sangat nyaman dengan pemandangan sawah di belakang hotel, top banget
Kamar kurang terang lampunya.

Staff ramah
Kamar luas

Harga mahal

Sedang ada renovasi kamar sehingga mengganggu kenyamanan bahkan sampai dipindah ke kamar yg double .

Suasana Hotel nya enak tapi kamar nya sudah perlu di renovasi: pintu kamar sudah bergelembung besar, ranjang sudah menipis dan keras, akses kolam renang hanya melalui ruang meeting yang ketika saya di sana sedang dipakai jadi saya harus keluar hotel lewat sawah dan masuk lagi lewat pintu samping untuk ke kolam renang nya. Selimut ada noda sekitar 3 cm dan ketika saya minta ganti dan tambah extra selimut sebagai alas sprei, pegawai nya pertama kurang senang dan mau minta biaya, ketika saya tidak mau bayar dan agak kurang senang dengan tingkah laku nya akhirnya dia bawakan saya selimut tipis.
Hotel yang bagus, tapi sayang sedikit jauh dari keramaian kota.
